body_txt: A specific type of Memetic Mutation , like the Memetic Badass but far, far worse for the character's reputation. Maybe the character has a habit of making unsettling facial expressions . Maybe they are just a little bit too casually hands-on with the people around them, even if they don't know them that well. Maybe their name , weaponry , or design is a bit... suggestive of something. Maybe they're involved in too many Accidental Innuendos . It could be justified in that those vibes of suspicion are coming from their preferred choice of company or method of blackmail . For whatever reason, the Fanon hivemind will portray this character as a rapist for the lulz . Compare and contrast with Memetic Psychopath , who is depicted as Ax-Crazy for laughs. Compare and contrast with a Memetic Troll , who is depicted as a Troll for laughs. Compare Yandere , which is when a character is like this in canon.                  noreallife
